Package kp.company.controller

Class EmployeeController

java.lang.Object
kp.company.controller.EmployeeController
@Controller public class EmployeeController extends Object
The web controller for the Employee.

  • Method Details

    • listTitles

      @ModelAttribute("titles") public List<Title> listTitles()
      Gets the list of the Titles.
      Returns:
      the list of titles

    • listEmployees

      @GetMapping("/listEmployees") public String listEmployees(long departmentId, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Gets the list of the Employees.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      model - the Model
      Returns:
      the view name

    • startEmployeeAdding

      @GetMapping("/startEmployeeAdding") public String startEmployeeAdding(long departmentId, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Starts the adding of the Employee.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      model - the Model
      Returns:
      the view name

    • startEmployeeEditing

      @GetMapping("/startEmployeeEditing") public String startEmployeeEditing(long departmentId, long employeeId, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Starts the editing of the Employee.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      employeeId - the id of the Employee
      model - the Model
      Returns:
      the view name

    • saveEmployee

      @PostMapping(value="/finishEmployeeEditing", params="save") public String saveEmployee(@Valid @Valid Employee employee, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
      Saves the Employee.
      Parameters:
      employee - the Employee
      bindingResult - the BindingResult
      Returns:
      the view name

    • cancelEmployeeEditing

      @PostMapping(value="/finishEmployeeEditing", params="cancel") public String cancelEmployeeEditing(long departmentId, @RequestParam("id") long employeeId)
      Cancels the editing of the Employee.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      employeeId - the id of the Employee
      Returns:
      the view name

    • startEmployeeDeleting

      @GetMapping("/startEmployeeDeleting") public String startEmployeeDeleting(long departmentId, long employeeId, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Starts the deleting of the Employee.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      employeeId - the id of the Employee
      model - the Model
      Returns:
      the view name

    • deleteEmployee

      @PostMapping(value="/finishEmployeeDeleting", params="delete") public String deleteEmployee(long departmentId, @RequestParam("id") long employeeId)
      Deletes the Employee.
      Parameters:
      departmentId - the id of the Department
      employeeId - the id of the Employee
      Returns:
      the view name

    • cancelEmployeeDeleting

      @PostMapping(value="/finishEmployeeDeleting", params="cancel") public String cancelEmployeeDeleting(long departmentId, @RequestParam("id") long employeeId)
